summary: Tested email gate lead magnet on /16-deadly-sins and full AUTO Method page overhaul. All 14 test criteria passed across backend API (4/4) and frontend UI tests.
critical_code_review_comments: All implemented features verified. No critical issues found.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email gate on /16-deadly-sins fully working: data-testid=sins-checklist-email and sins-checklist-download-btn present, confirmation message shows, /api/sins-checklist returns 200/ok:true with graceful MailerLite degradation. AUTO Method page has all required elements: A/U/T/O strip with AROUND/UNDER/THROUGH/OVER, OSHA origin story, 4 vectors with CFR ANCHOR text, OVER expanded text with financial cascade, LP-GRD-01 to LP-GRD-04 guards with BLOCKS labels, LP-GRD-04 shows BLOCKS: ALL VECTORS, Next in Framework on all 3 pages (/16-deadly-sins→/auto-method, /auto-method→/operating-standard, /operating-standard→/ground-0-briefing), primary CTA is VIEW THE OPERATING STANDARD, View 16 Deadly Sins link present on /auto-method.
